name: Sweet Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the rice in a bowl and add 2 cups of water. Cover the bowl and soak the rice overnight.
2. Thirty minutes to one hour before serving, transfer the rice and remaining water into a medium-sized pot. Stir in the coconut milk, cover tightly, and cook for 20 minutes over low heat.
3. After 10 minutes, stir once. The finished grains will have a thick, sticky consistency. Top with fruit and serve.
